message:
fix: remove dead GetUndefinedVariables, add backoff to dolt recovery (gt-oz5qe, gt-qgin3)

Remove GetUndefinedVariables which was dead code that fragily parsed its
own error string to extract variable names. Replace fixed 2-second wait
in RecoverReadOnly with exponential backoff retry loop (5 attempts,
500ms-8s) matching the pattern used by doltSQLWithRetry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
